From Dreamforce to World Tours, showcase your innovation alongside some of the most influential brands in technology.\\n\\n[Learn More](https://www.salesforce.com/blog/customer-success-awards/)\\n\\n## Four Paths to Win\\n\\nWe are looking for the \"Best of the Best\" across the four systems of the Salesforce Agentic Enterprise Architecture:\\n\\n![](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/system_of_context_1200x800.png?w=1024)\\n\\n### System of Context\\n\\nUsing unified data and insights to help teams make smarter decisions and deliver more personalized experiences with Agentforce.\\n\\n![](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/system_of_work_1200x800.png?w=1024)\\n\\n### System of Work\\n\\nStreamlining work and increasing productivity by putting Agentforce into everyday workflows and business processes.\\n\\n![](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/system_of_agency_1200x800.png?w=1024)\\n\\n### System of Agency\\n\\nUsing multiple AI agents together to solve complex tasks, scale support, and improve how work gets done.\\n\\n![](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/system_of_engagement_1200x800.png?w=1024)\\n\\n### System of Engagement\\n\\nCreating seamless customer and employee
